name: Launch Update Log
description: Campaign update feed for maker notes, prototype milestones, shipping updates, stretch-goal unlocks, and backer announcements.

update-console.description: Console-like update feed with pinned latest update, category filters, and expandable entries.

slots.pinned-update: Latest or critical campaign update highlighted at top.
slots.filter-strip: All, prototype, funding, shipping, stretch goals, press, and backer notes.
slots.update-entry: Date, category, title, summary, media, and expandable body.
slots.subscribe-action: Follow updates, email, RSS, or share action.

shipping-log.description: Fulfillment-focused update log with manufacturing stages, shipping windows, risks, and resolved issues.

visual_brief: A trustworthy campaign update log with retro console styling. It should make progress, blockers, and decisions easy to scan. Pinned updates and shipping/production notes should be factual and visible. Avoid turning updates into anonymous blog cards.

responsive.mobile: Single-column update feed with category filter as segmented scroll row.
responsive.desktop: Pinned latest update alongside filter/status rail, with feed entries below or beside.

layout_hints.trust: Updates should distinguish shipped, in-progress, delayed, and unlocked states.
layout_hints.filtering: Categories should support campaign-specific concerns like prototype, funding, shipping, and stretch goals.
layout_hints.media: Use photos/screenshots for evidence where available.

micro.filter: selected filter snaps into active state
micro.expand: update body expands with short height transition

composition.UpdateEntry: Entry > [Date + CategoryBadge + Title + Summary + Media? + BodyToggle]

keyboard: Filter buttons should be reachable and expose selected state.
Expandable updates should use button semantics.
